## Dataset Versions

### v2 (Original High Quality)
- THLP: 19,681 MC questions
- TTM: 733 MC questions
- TAGP: 17,601 MC questions
- TEFB: 21,081 MC questions
- TSCP: 2,839 MC questions

### v5 (Refined Quality)
- TTM: 600 unique MC questions (quality improved)
- TSCP: 500 unique MC questions (quality improved)

Note: Both v2 and v5 versions are available on Kaggle. Use v5 for latest quality.

---

## Brain Zones Covered

| Track | Brain Zone | Cognitive Function |
|-------|-------------|-------------------|
| THLP  | Hippocampus / EC | Pattern learning, error-driven learning |
| TTM   | PCC / dlPFC | Metacognition, executive control |
| TAGP  | Parietal / FEF / Thalamus | Attentional control, filtering |
| TEFB  | dlPFC / ACC / OFC | Working memory, conflict monitoring, value decisions |
| TSCP  | TPJ / OFC / mPFC | Theory of Mind, social values, mentalizing |

---

2. **Submit to competition**: Submit predictions via competition page
3. **Monitor leaderboard**: Track rankings across all 5 tracks
4. **Update write-up**: Document results after competition ends
